response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with C++ (used at National Instruments) and strong software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, agile collaboration), but lacks recent deep C++ application development in industrial automation contexts. His focus has shifted toward full-stack (Node.js, React, TypeScript) and D language, with no clear evidence of secure industrial-cybersecurity practices (e.g., IEC 62443) or cloud platform solutions (e.g., Azure). While he demonstrates architectural and performance optimization skills, the gap in industrial automation, C++ STL mastery, and security compliance raises concerns for direct fit.
strengths: Proven C++ expertise at National Instruments in LabWindows™/CVI, demonstrating low-level system development skills
Strong agile development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and mentorship experience
Demonstrated ability to architect scalable, event-driven systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby) with performance optimizations
concerns: Limited recent C++ application development in industrial automation (last C++ role in 2015), raising doubts about current STL proficiency
No evident experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle practices
Minimal cloud platform experience (no Azure/industrial cloud solutions) and no exposure to IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or messaging brokers

key_factors.factor: IoT/industrial protocol knowledge (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT)
